glosses.ja: スーツケース; 旅行かばん

sentences.target: J'ai oublié ma valise dans le train.
sentences.reading: /ʒe ublje ma valiz dɑ̃ lə tʁɛ̃/

translations.fr: J'ai oublié ma valise dans le train.
translations.ipa: /ʒe ublje ma valiz dɑ̃ lə tʁɛ̃/
translations.en: I forgot my suitcase on the train.
translations.es: Olvidé mi maleta en el tren.
translations.de: Ich habe meinen Koffer im Zug vergessen.
translations.it: Ho dimenticato la mia valigia sul treno.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把行李箱忘在火车上了。
translations.yue: 我喺火車上唔記得攞走個行李箱。
translations.ru: Я забыл свой чемодан в поезде.
translations.vi: Tôi đã quên chiếc va li trên tàu.
translations.nl: Ik ben mijn koffer in de trein vergeten.
translations.uk: Я забув свою валізу в поїзді.
translations.hi: मैं ट्रेन में अपना सूटकेस भूल गया।
translations.el: Ξέχασα τη βαλίτσα μου στο τρένο.
translations.nb: Jeg glemte kofferten min på toget.
translations.id: Saya lupa koper saya di kereta.
translations.sv: Jag glömde min resväska på tåget.
translations.cs: Zapomněl jsem svůj kufr ve vlaku.
translations.da: Jeg glemte min kuffert i toget.
translations.ja: 電車にスーツケースを忘れました。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of the subject clitic 'je' with the auxiliary 'ai' (avoir, 1sg present) forming the passé composé with the following past participle.
Past participle of the verb 'oublier' used with the auxiliary 'avoir' to form a compound past.
1st person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular agreeing with 'valise'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'oublier'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, preceding 'train'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'dans'.

sentences.target: Ta valise est trop lourde pour moi.
sentences.reading: /ta valiz ɛ tʁo luʁd puʁ mwa/

translations.fr: Ta valise est trop lourde pour moi.
translations.ipa: /ta valiz ɛ tʁo luʁd puʁ mwa/
translations.en: Your suitcase is too heavy for me.
translations.es: Tu maleta es demasiado pesada para mí.
translations.de: Dein Koffer ist zu schwer für mich.
translations.it: La tua valigia è troppo pesante per me.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的行李箱对我来说太重了。
translations.yue: 你個行李箱對我嚟講太重啦。
translations.ru: Твой чемодан для меня слишком тяжёлый.
translations.pt: Sua mala é pesada demais para mim.
translations.vi: Va li của bạn quá nặng đối với tôi.
translations.nl: Je koffer is te zwaar voor mij.
translations.uk: Твоя валіза для мене занадто важка.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा सूटकेस मेरे लिए बहुत भारी है।
translations.pl: Twoja walizka jest dla mnie za ciężka.
translations.el: Η βαλίτσα σου είναι πολύ βαριά για μένα.
translations.nb: Kofferten din er for tung for meg.
translations.id: Koper kamu terlalu berat untuk saya.
translations.sv: Din resväska är för tung för mig.
translations.ro: Valiza ta este prea grea pentru mine.
translations.cs: Tvůj kufr je pro mě moc těžký.
translations.da: Din kuffert er for tung for mig.
translations.ja: あなたのスーツケースは私には重すぎます.

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular possessive determiner, feminine singular, modifying 'valise'.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the copular clause.
3rd person singular present of 'être' used as a copula linking the subject to the predicate adjective.
Degree adverb modifying the adjective 'lourde'.
Adjective, feminine singular, predicative complement agreeing with 'valise'.
Preposition introducing the beneficiary/experiencer complement.
Stressed (disjunctive) 1st person singular pronoun used after the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: On met la valise dans le coffre.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ mɛ la valiz dɑ̃ lə kɔfʁ/

translations.fr: On met la valise dans le coffre.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ mɛ la valiz dɑ̃ lə kɔfʁ/
translations.en: We’re putting the suitcase in the trunk.
translations.es: Estamos metiendo la maleta en el maletero.
translations.de: Wir legen den Koffer in den Kofferraum.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把行李箱放进后备箱。
translations.yue: 我哋將個行李箱放入車尾箱。
translations.pt: Estamos colocando a mala no porta-malas.
translations.he: אנחנו שמים את המזוודה בתא המטען.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đặt va li vào cốp xe.
translations.nl: We zetten de koffer in de kofferbak.
translations.hi: हम सूटकेस को डिक्की में रख रहे हैं.
translations.id: Kami sedang memasukkan koper ke bagasi mobil.
translations.ja: スーツケースをトランクに入れています。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite/colloquial subject pronoun meaning 'one/we'; grammatically 3rd person singular.
3rd person singular present of 'mettre'; main verb of the clause.
Definite article, feminine singular, preceding 'valise'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'met'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article, masculine singular, preceding 'coffre'.
Common noun; complement of the preposition 'dans' (car trunk).

sentences.target: Je cherche une valise solide et légère.
sentences.reading: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn valiz sɔlid e leʒɛʁ/

translations.fr: Je cherche une valise solide et légère.
translations.ipa: /ʒə ʃɛʁʃ yn valiz sɔlid e leʒɛʁ/
translations.en: I’m looking for a sturdy, light suitcase.
translations.es: Estoy buscando una maleta resistente y ligera.
translations.de: Ich suche einen robusten, leichten Koffer.
translations.it: Cerco una valigia robusta e leggera.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找一个结实又轻的行李箱。
translations.yue: 我想搵一個結實又輕嘅行李箱。
translations.ru: Я ищу прочный и лёгкий чемодан.
translations.pt: Estou procurando uma mala resistente e leve.
translations.tr: Sağlam ve hafif bir valiz arıyorum.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm một chiếc va li bền và nhẹ.
translations.nl: Ik zoek een stevige en lichte koffer.
translations.uk: Я шукаю міцну й легку валізу.
translations.hi: मैं एक मज़बूत और हल्का सूटकेस ढूंढ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Ψάχνω μια ανθεκτική και ελαφριά βαλίτσα.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter en solid og lett koffert.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari koper yang kuat dan ringan.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter en robust och lätt resväska.
translations.ro: Caut o valiză rezistentă și ușoară.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter en robust og let kuffert.
translations.ja: 頑丈で軽いスーツケースを探しています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
1st person singular present of 'chercher'; main verb.
Indefinite article, feminine singular, introducing the noun 'valise'.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'cherche'.
Adjective; post-nominal modifier of 'valise'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two adjectives modifying 'valise'.
Adjective, feminine singular agreeing with 'valise'; coordinated with 'solide'.
